text_block_list.text: During training with Smart Falcon...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ugh! My legs are all gross!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It was raining not that long ago, so the track's
condition is just the worst!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, maybe we should. I really wanna keep
going, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As a cute Umadol, I think this amount of mud is
just not gonna work...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can't let myself get cold... Maybe I should
stretch for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look, Trainer! It looks like Oguri is training
too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: As a fellow Umadol, I can't not say hello! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Of course! After all...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oguri is super popular with people in her
hometown, Kasamatsu!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
In my eyes, that makes her a super famous
Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Good work out there, Oguri! ☆ We're both totally
covered in mud, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... Falco? Now that you mention it, we are.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking of finishing up soon. Are you gonna
keep going?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Doesn't training in the mud bother you at all?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No, not particularly.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I think it's because no matter how dirty I get,
everyone in my hometown has always supported
me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Well... I'm going to get back to training. See you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Urghhh! Looks like my research was lacking!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That unflappable spirit must be the core of
Oguri's Umadol identity!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right! I can't let anyone outdo me when it
comes to sheer Umadol spirit!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta train with Oguri and get closer to
becoming a top Umadol!
choice_data_list: Go all out and do your best!
Go all out and do your best!
Let's ask her to do some partner running.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta train with Oguri and get closer to
becoming a top Umadol!
choice_data_list: Go all out and do your best!
Go all out and do your best!
Let's ask her to do some partner running.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer! ☆ I'm off, then!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Oguri! I'm gonna keep training too!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Falco... I see.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Let's run until we feel like we're going to
collapse.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yes! I was hoping you'd say that!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you. I have more to look forward to
now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
After all, the more energy you expend, the more
delicious the food you eat afterwards will taste.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, don't tell me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Is that the reason why you don't care if you get dirty while you train?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: YAAAAGH!
Craaash!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Falco?! It's too early to collapse!

Afterwards, Smart Falcon continues running with
Oguri Cap, significantly improving her hardiness
and perseverance!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's the plan! Well then, off I go!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Oguri! I was wondering if you'd mind doing
some partner running with me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Falco... Okay, sure.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You set the pace, and I'll run from behind, like a
real race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yes! I was hoping you'd say that!
After they finish their training...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh... Falco, you've got mud on your cheek.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: No! No, no, no! I can deal with it if it's on my tracksuit, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As an Umadol, my face is a no-go! Trainer, get me
a towel!

...In any case, Smart Falcon's awareness as a front
runner improves significantly thanks to pair
running with Oguri Cap!
